value:
Don't react to the market.
Lead it.
Find the right projects. Act on better data. Grow with confidence.
Earlier signals. Sharper decisions. From first permit to final strategy.
Find Projects Earlier
Access planning-stage commercial projects before they hit bid boards — with specs, contacts, and enough lead time to win.
- See specs before bids are issued — access documents during planning and design
- Know who is behind every project: architects, owners, and contractors
- Never miss a relevant opportunity with automated alerts
Send & Receive Private ITBs
The Blue Book is where project owners go to find qualified subs and suppliers. ProView, BidScope, and OneTeam connect every side of the bid process — privately.
- ProView puts your profile in front of active buyers — 19M views annually
- BidScope delivers direct ITBs to your inbox when your trade is actually needed
- OneTeam lets GCs send private bid invitations across 560+ trade categories
- Competitors never see who you're soliciting or which projects you're pursuing
See Market Trends
Enhance your planning with detailed construction market forecasts — tied to economic indicators and built by the industry's most experienced analyst team.
- Track construction activity by segment and geography — down to county level
- Benchmark against decades of verified historical construction starts
- See your competitive position clearly across product categories and channels
Conduct Research and Get Consulting Advice
Dodge's unmatched construction intelligence powers every engagement — from targeted studies to full-service strategic advisory.
- Customer Sentiment Pulse Studies and Buyer Behavior Audits surface the demand signals your strategy depends on
- Market Model Support and Scenario Planning Packages use proprietary data to build credible bull, base, and bear cases
- SmartMarket Reports and Full-Service Consulting put Dodge's research team to work on your toughest growth challenges
Every project is verified by our team — cross-referenced, verified, and updated daily. Your decisions deserve data that's actually accurate.
Human-Verified Research
Every project verified by our team — contacts, stage, status, value, specs — refreshed daily.
Earliest Lifecycle Visibility
Track projects from the first planning permit — months before any bid board has them.
Full Ecosystem Coverage
Projects, contacts, and relationships across the entire commercial construction market.
Dodge connects to the tools your team already uses — no new workflows, no disruption.
Full intelligence in your pocket.
Track projects, check bid status, and get real-time alerts — in the office or on site.
CRM Integrations
Push project data and verified contacts directly into your CRM. Less manual entry, more time selling. Works with Salesforce, HubSpot, and MS Dynamics.
API & Data Feeds
Access the full Dodge dataset programmatically. Build custom dashboards, automate territory analysis, and enrich your own data.
Our economists track the signals shaping construction and break down what they mean for your next move.
The people who use Dodge every day.
Teams find better projects, build stronger pipelines, and win more work.
The difference with Dodge is that it's actually easy for salespeople to use. It gives my reps a starting point every day, and it eliminates the guesswork. When it comes to who to call or where to focus, the answer is right there.
As a small team, we don't have time to chase bids or cold call just to get on a list. Dodge puts real opportunities directly in front of us, the kind we can actually win.
Clear view.
Confident action.
We'll show you exactly what Dodge reveals in your market.
Request a Demo →
